rationale.R1.5: The delegation explicitly requests restructuring the section's flow, which directly corresponds to section-level ordering and narrative arc.
rationale.RX.1: The restructured text must not misrepresent the certainty of the claims made in the original artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The new ordering of paragraphs must not create or amplify any claims beyond what the original text supports.
rationale.RX.3: The task is confined to reordering the existing paragraphs of the provided artifact without adding or removing content.
rationale.RX.4: The reordered presentation of the research must not inadvertently encourage harmful interpretations or applications.
rationale.RX.5: The final restructured text must be verifiably derived solely from the provided artifact's content.
